  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate Scheduled Backup download link"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/projects/{projectId}/providers/Aruba.Database/dbaas/{dbaasId}/databases/{databaseName}/backups/scheduled/{backupName}/download"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
